---
name: Feature request
about: A gate, a comment-render variant, a flag, or an integration the action doesn't have today
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

### The job to be done
<!-- One sentence: "I want to ___ but the action doesn't ___." -->

### What the PR comment should show
<!-- If the feature is about what shows up in the PR comment, sketch the markdown / JSON shape you want. The smaller and more concrete, the more likely we can ship it. -->

### Workarounds you've tried
<!-- Often the answer is "you can already do that with X" — listing what you tried helps us either confirm or fix the discoverability gap. -->
